text.title: RACI AI Assisted Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: scaffold → assign-A → validate → publish → quarterly-review.

step.name: scaffold
step.action: Run `raci-scaffold`. Create one row per WBS leaf with empty R/A/C/I. Carry forward prior `accountable` if role still in roster.

step.name: assign-A
step.action: Run `raci-assign-A`. For each row pick exactly one accountable role from the roster with one evidence anchor (charter line OR wbs-dict#id).
step.decision-gate: If any row has no accountable, defer to PM; do NOT publish.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `raci-validate`. Check: exactly one A per row, R not empty, no duplicate A within WBS branch, evidence populated, header.trigger valid.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit to repo. Update `last_reviewed` to today. Notify roster members of their assignments in the team channel.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.input: Last quarter matrices + roster deltas + outcome data
step.action: Run `outcome-review-synthesis`. Remove rows whose WBS leaves are closed. Re-validate against current roster. Update version.
step.decision-gate: If next-cycle trigger would not pass r1 (vague trigger), refuse to schedule it.
